sql.top5_quarterly_lines: WITH top_districts AS (SELECT district_id, "A2" AS district FROM district ORDER BY CAST("A4" AS INTEGER) DESC LIMIT 5) SELECT td.district, DATE_TRUNC('quarter', t.date)::date AS trans_quarter, SUM(t.amount) AS total_transaction_amount, COUNT(t.trans_id) AS transaction_count FROM top_districts td JOIN account a ON a.district_id = td.district_id JOIN trans t ON t.account_id = a.account_id WHERE t.date >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND t.date < DATE '1998-01-01' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2;
sql.top5_quarterly_bar: WITH top_districts AS (SELECT district_id, "A2" AS district FROM district ORDER BY CAST("A4" AS INTEGER) DESC LIMIT 5) SELECT DATE_TRUNC('quarter', t.date)::date AS trans_quarter, td.district, SUM(t.amount) AS total_transaction_amount FROM top_districts td JOIN account a ON a.district_id = td.district_id JOIN trans t ON t.account_id = a.account_id WHERE t.date >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND t.date < DATE '1998-01-01' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2;

filters: top 5 districts by CAST(district.A4 AS INTEGER)
charts.layout_intent: one line chart per top district

chart_spec.layout_intent: 2x3 grid with five district line charts and one combined bar chart
